name: Asante Incorporated
summary: Asante Incorporated engages in the house amenity and total sanitation businesses in Japan. The company offers house maintenance services, which include termite control; measures against humidity; earthquake countermeasures; and remodeling/new construction services, as well as handles solar power generation system, and electric home remodeling services. It also provides pest control and bedbug control services, as well as takes countermeasures against vermin and birds. The company was formerly known as Sanyo Shodoku Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Asante Incorporated in January 1994. Asante Incorporated was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
